locked.desc: The Terrane Enterprise license for this deployment has not been activated. Activate it to continue.
locked.expiredDesc: The Terrane Enterprise license for this deployment has expired. Re-activate or contact the vendor to renew.
locked.revokedDesc: The license for this deployment has been revoked. Contact the vendor.
locked.mismatchDesc: The license is not bound to this deployment. Use a license that matches this Deployment ID.

activate.modalSubtitle: Enter your license to activate the system.
activate.deploymentIdHint: Generated live from this machine's hardware (hard binding). Provide it to the vendor to issue your license.

login.title: Hey, let's get started!
login.welcome: 👋 Welcome! Please sign in to access the admin console.

changePassword.title: First sign-in · Change password
changePassword.desc: The factory super-admin password equals the email. Set a new password before entering the console.
changePassword.policy: At least 12 characters with 3 of: upper, lower, digit, symbol; must not equal your email.
changePassword.mismatch: The two passwords do not match.

wizard.title: Setup wizard
wizard.welcome: Welcome, {name}. Finish a few basics to get started.
wizard.emailDesc: Configure SMTP for verification, notification, and alert emails. Editable later in settings, or skip for now. Works with 163/QQ/Gmail/enterprise mail and any SMTP provider.
wizard.fromLockedHint: This provider requires the From address to equal the login username
wizard.allowInsecure: Allow insecure TLS (only for internal self-signed certs)

emailHint.auth_failed: Authentication failed: check username/password. Chinese mailboxes (163/QQ) need an authorization code, not the login password; Gmail/Outlook with 2FA need an app password or OAuth.
emailHint.auth_or_tls_required: Server requires authentication or encryption first. Provide credentials and choose SSL or STARTTLS.
emailHint.from_not_allowed: From address rejected: most providers require it to exactly match the login account. Set the From address to your login email.
emailHint.temporary: Server temporarily unavailable or rate-limiting. Retry shortly; reduce send rate if it persists.
emailHint.rejected: Message rejected by the server (often spam/policy). Review content, sending domain, and SPF/DKIM.
emailHint.connect_failed: Connection failed: check SMTP host, port, and encryption match (465→SSL, 587→STARTTLS), and network reachability.
emailHint.tls_failed: TLS handshake failed: certificate mismatch or wrong encryption mode. For internal self-signed certs, enable "Allow insecure TLS".
emailHint.smtp_error: Send failed. Check your SMTP configuration.

wizard.brandingDesc: Set the product name and accent color, applied across the app and admin console. Editable later in settings.
wizard.testSent: Test email sent — check your inbox

admin.welcomeDesc: Signed in to the admin console, {name}. Business modules roll out in later stages.

channels.title: Model channels
channels.desc: Configure this deployment's LLM / embedding / rerank / web-search backends (the channel side of the gateway).
channels.empty: No channels yet. Click "New channel" and pick a provider type.

testErr.auth_failed: Auth failed: invalid key or no access

channels.deleteDesc: Delete model channel "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

password.title: Edit password
password.desc: Change your own admin sign-in password. A new session is issued on change — no re-login needed.
password.policyHint: Must meet the platform password policy (min length and character classes).
password.mismatch: The two new passwords do not match.

ws.title: Workspaces
ws.desc: All workspaces (personal/team) on the platform, with member counts and status.
ws.deleteDesc: Delete workspace "{name}"? This cannot be undone and removes all its users and data.

members.title: Members
members.desc: All registered front-end users, their workspace, role, and status.
members.createdDesc: Account created for {email} (ready to use, email verification skipped).
members.genPasswordHint: Hand this to the user securely — it's shown only once.
members.fPasswordPlaceholder: Leave blank to auto-generate a strong password
members.resetDesc: Generate a new strong password for {email}? The old password stops working immediately.
members.deleteDesc: Delete member "{email}"? This cannot be undone. A personal workspace will be removed too.
members.filteredByWs: Showing members of this workspace only

operators.title: System Users
operators.desc: Accounts that can sign in to the admin console (Super Admin / Admin / Auditor), with roles and status.
operators.createdDesc: Admin account created for {email}. They must change the initial password on first sign-in.
operators.genPasswordHint: Hand it over securely — shown only once; they must change it on first sign-in.
operators.resetHint: Hand it over securely — shown only once; they must change it on first sign-in.
operators.fPasswordPlaceholder: Leave blank to auto-generate and force change on first sign-in
operators.resetDesc: Generate a new strong password for {email}? The old one stops working immediately and they must change it on first sign-in.
operators.deleteDesc: Delete operator "{email}"? This cannot be undone; all their sessions are revoked.

settings.title: Settings
settings.desc: Platform configuration — editable any time after the setup wizard.

license.title: License
license.desc: View the current Terrane Enterprise license. To replace it, use the activation flow on the lock screen.

password.title: Password policy
password.desc: Password complexity rules — applied to registration, password change, admin-created members, and resets.

login.title: Login settings
login.desc: Login protection and sessions — lockout, session lifetime, etc.; enforced across front and back ends.

security.title: Security
security.desc: Platform security policy — password rules, etc., enforced everywhere a password is set.
security.pwDesc: Applies to registration, password change, admin-created members, and password resets.
security.charClassesHint: How many of upper / lower / digit / symbol must be present.
security.lockDesc: Temporarily lock an account after repeated failed logins, to resist brute force.
security.lockThresholdHint: Lock after this many consecutive failures (3–50).
security.lockMinutesHint: How long the lock lasts before auto-release (1–1440 min).
security.sessionDesc: Maximum lifetime of a login session before re-authentication is required.

settings.testSent: Test email sent — check your inbox
settings.passwordKept: Leave blank to keep the current password
settings.logoHint: PNG/JPG/SVG/WebP, square recommended, ≤ 700KB; shown in the sidebar, login page, and browser icon.
settings.logoTooLarge: Image too large (must be ≤ 700KB). Please compress and retry.

email.title: Email service
email.desc: SMTP for verification, notification, and alert emails. Works with 163/QQ/Gmail/enterprise mail and any SMTP provider.

branding.title: Branding
branding.desc: Application title, logos, accent color and other white-label items, applied across the app and admin console.
branding.appTitleUsage: Shown in the browser tab and emails (50 chars max).
branding.consoleLogoUsage: Shown in the top-left of the console/app. Any width × 40px; PNG/SVG, ≤ 700KB.
branding.loginLogoUsage: Shown on the login page. Any width × 44px; PNG/SVG, ≤ 700KB.
branding.faviconUsage: Shown in the browser address bar. At least 32×32, 1:1; PNG/ICO/SVG, ≤ 700KB.
branding.accentUsage: Accent color for buttons, links and highlights.
branding.subtitleUsage: Subtitle shown under the login page title.
branding.supportUsage: Optional link for a support/help entry.

audit.title: Audit logs
audit.desc: Immutable, append-only record of all admin-side changes (metadata only).
audit.actionPlaceholder: Filter by action, e.g. wizard. (trailing dot = prefix)

common.confirmDeletePrompt: Type the following exactly to confirm deletion:

errors.AUTH_ACCOUNT_LOCKED: This account is locked due to too many failed attempts. Try again later.
errors.AUTH_ACCOUNT_DISABLED: This account has been disabled. Contact an administrator.
errors.AUTH_PASSWORD_WEAK: Password too weak: at least 12 chars with 3 character classes, and must not equal your email.
errors.AUTH_PASSWORD_REUSED: The new password must differ from the current password.
errors.RATE_LIMIT_LOGIN_BLOCKED: Too many sign-in attempts. Please try again later.
errors.LICENSE_BINDING_MISMATCH: The license is not bound to this deployment (Deployment ID mismatch).
errors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many activation attempts. Please try again later.
errors.AUTH_REQUIRED: Replacing an active license requires super admin authentication.
errors.PERM_DENIED: You don't have permission to perform this action.
errors.WIZARD_ALREADY_DONE: The setup wizard is already complete.
errors.SYSTEM_UNAVAILABLE: Service unavailable (e.g. SMTP connection failed). Check the configuration and retry.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Network request failed. Check your connection.
errors.OPERATOR_SELF_FORBIDDEN: You can't perform this action on your own signed-in account.
errors.OPERATOR_LAST_SUPER_ADMIN: Can't delete/disable/demote the last super admin.
errors.SYSTEM_HTTP_ERROR: System error. Please try again later.

kbOverview.title: Knowledge bases
kbOverview.desc: Platform overview of all workspace knowledge bases (read-only metadata).
